title: pieris lucida
intro: Pieris lucida, also known as mountain lion's tail or eastern dogwood, is a deciduous shrub native to the eastern United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Pieris lucida include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pieris lucida typically involve steeping the leaves and twigs in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
